title: Find The Setting
ticket: Mike cannot find where to change an app setting.
clue: Some options live in Settings, others in Control Panel.
careerConnection: Support roles constantly locate hidden settings.

interactiveDemo.prompt: Where might an older app setting still live?

actionTask.instructions: Find the uninstall or default-app path in both Settings and Control Panel.
actionTask.expectedResult: You can navigate both tools without help.
actionTask.screenshotExample: Settings and Control Panel windows both open.

repeatTask: Repeat the navigation flow with fewer hints.
breakFixTask: Change the wrong safe setting, then restore it.
verificationChecklist: Can you do it without help?
ticketCompletion: Mike can find the correct settings path.
